replenishment_policy.instruction: If fewer than minimum_todo_tasks remain, generate new tasks from: 1) docs/game_design.md AI system, 2) unimplemented ball types, 3) missing AI behaviors, 4) game modes, 5) arenas, 6) skills. Focus on AI improvements first.

autonomous_loop_policy.selection_rule: Choose the first todo task. Prioritize AI-related tasks.
autonomous_loop_policy.anti_stall_rule: Never ask user what to do. Generate tasks from game_design.md AI system.
autonomous_loop_policy.failure_rule: If CI fails, fix before new features.
autonomous_loop_policy.idea_generation: After completing a task, read docs/game_design.md AI section and suggest 2-3 new AI tasks.

tasks.title: Improve Web Visualizer (index.html)
tasks.description: The user requested improvements to visualizer/index.html. We need to add better UI controls (pause/play, timeline slider, speed control), show the winner clearly, fix any bugs, improve the rendering quality (e.g. better shadows, text showing ball HP or class), and make it fully responsive. Ensure all JS is clean and robust.

tasks.title: Implement Ball Brain architecture
tasks.description: Create the core AI system: BallBrain class with 4 layers: Perception (find enemies/allies/boosters), Emotion (fear/rage/greed based on HP and situation), Decision (choose strategy), Action (execute behavior). Each ball gets its own Brain instance.
acceptance: Each ball has its own Brain instance
Brain processes perception -> emotion -> decision -> action
Basic decisions work: chase, flee, attack

tasks.title: Implement Perception system
tasks.description: Create Perception class that scans the world: finds nearby enemies, allies, boosters, traps. Calculates distances, threat levels, opportunity scores. Each ball has perception radius based on type.
acceptance: Perception finds all entities in radius
Perception radius varies by ball type

tasks.title: Implement Emotion system
tasks.description: Create Emotion class that models ball's emotional state: Fear (low HP), Rage (ally killed), Greed (sees booster), Cowardice (first hit), Heroism (ally in danger), Bloodlust (killed 2+ enemies). Emotions modify behavior.
acceptance: Emotions trigger based on correct conditions
Emotions modify behavior (fear = flee, rage = attack)

tasks.title: Implement Decision system
tasks.description: Create Decision class that evaluates options and chooses action: weighs threat level, opportunity, personality, emotional state. Returns best action: chase, flee, attack, use skill, collect booster, defend.
acceptance: Decisions are deterministic given same state

tasks.title: Implement Action execution system
tasks.description: Create Action class that executes chosen behavior: move to target, attack, use skill, flee, collect booster. Handles pathfinding, timing, and cooldowns.

tasks.title: Implement Personality system
tasks.description: Create Personality class that defines ball's character: aggressive, cautious, supportive, reckless, cunning. Each ball type has default personality. Personality influences decision weights.

tasks.title: Implement Chase behavior
tasks.description: Ball moves towards nearest enemy. Uses pathfinding to avoid obstacles. Stops when in attack range. Can be modified by fear (runs away) or greed (chases booster instead).
acceptance: Can be interrupted by higher priority

tasks.title: Implement Flee behavior
tasks.description: Ball moves away from nearest threat. Prioritizes moving towards allies or safe zones. Speed boost when fleeing. Can stop when safe.

tasks.title: Implement Attack behavior
tasks.description: Ball attacks when in range. Timing varies by ball type (fast for Scout, slow for Tank). Can chain attacks. Uses skill when available and optimal.

tasks.title: Implement Kite behavior
tasks.description: Ball maintains distance from enemy while attacking. Moves back when enemy approaches, attacks when enemy retreats. Used by Sniper and ranged types.

tasks.title: Implement Flank behavior
tasks.description: Ball moves behind enemy for bonus damage. Uses stealth (Ninja) or speed (Scout) to get behind. Attacks from behind for critical hit.

tasks.title: Implement Group Attack behavior
tasks.description: Multiple balls coordinate to attack same target. Balls signal intent and converge. Tank takes aggro, damage dealers attack, healer supports.

tasks.title: Implement Collect Booster behavior
tasks.description: Ball moves towards nearest booster. Ignores enemies when collecting (greed). Can be interrupted if enemy gets too close.

tasks.title: Implement Warrior AI profile
tasks.description: Warrior AI: aggressive personality, high attack priority, never flees, uses Wave Attack when 2+ enemies in front, charges into battle.
acceptance: Never flees even at low HP
Has unique battle cry on kill

tasks.title: Implement Scout AI profile
tasks.description: Scout AI: curious personality, seeks boosters, attacks weak enemies, flees from strong ones, uses Dash to escape or chase.

tasks.title: Implement Tank AI profile
tasks.description: Tank AI: brave personality, protects allies, uses Shield when taking damage, body blocks for healers, draws aggro.

tasks.title: Implement Healer AI profile
tasks.description: Healer AI: caring personality, follows wounded allies, heals them, avoids combat, uses heal on cooldown.

tasks.title: Implement Sniper AI profile
tasks.description: Sniper AI: cautious personality, maintains distance, uses Snipe from max range, kites enemies, avoids melee.

tasks.title: Implement Bomber AI profile
tasks.description: Bomber AI: reckless personality, seeks crowded enemy groups, uses Bomb when 3+ enemies nearby, suicide attacks.

tasks.title: Implement Ninja AI profile
tasks.description: Ninja AI: cunning personality, uses Stealth to approach, attacks from behind for critical, flees after attack, hit-and-run tactics.

tasks.title: Implement King AI profile
tasks.description: King AI: leader personality, stays behind allies, uses Command to buff team, targets low HP allies to boost, avoids direct combat.

tasks.title: Implement AI difficulty levels
tasks.description: Create difficulty system: Easy (slow reactions, simple decisions), Medium (normal), Hard (fast, optimal), Chaos (random, funny). Affects reaction time, decision quality, skill usage.
acceptance: Difficulty can be set per ball or globally

tasks.title: Implement Team coordination AI
tasks.description: Balls in same team share information: call out targets, request help, coordinate attacks. Tank signals to hold position, Healer calls for wounded, Sniper calls out threats.
acceptance: Call for help when low HP

tasks.title: Threat Heatmap Pathfinding
tasks.description: Enhance A* navigation by overlaying a dynamic threat heatmap based on enemy DPS and attack ranges. Instead of finding the shortest path, A* will minimize a 'danger cost' function. Technical implementation involves creating a new helper method `_find_path` or modifying obstacle avoidance in `src/ai/action.py` to evaluate nodes using a new `danger_coefficient` grid maintained by the Arena state.

tasks.title: Zombie Infection Mode
tasks.description: A mode where one powerful 'Zombie' ball starts against a large number of regular balls. When a regular ball is killed by a Zombie, it resurrects as a Zombie. The regular balls win if they survive until the timer runs out, while the Zombies win if they infect everyone.

tasks.title: Black Hole Arena
tasks.description: An arena featuring a massive, slow-moving black hole in the center that gradually pulls all balls and boosters towards it. The gravitational pull gets stronger closer to the center, forcing balls to use their movement skills creatively to avoid being crushed while trying to push enemies in.

tasks.title: Sniper Trap Placement
tasks.description: Sniper balls can drop temporary traps while kiting. Enemies that step on these traps receive a slowing effect, allowing the Sniper to effectively maintain their distance and continue to deal damage safely.

tasks.title: Capture the Flag Mode
tasks.description: A team-based game mode where balls must coordinate to steal the enemy's flag (a special booster object) and return it to their base. Introduces new AI behaviors for defending the base, escorting the flag carrier, and intercepting enemy carriers.

tasks.title: Dynamic Fitness Evaluation for Neural Balls
tasks.description: Enhance the evolutionary training system by using a dynamic fitness evaluation formula that penalizes passive survival (camping) and rewards active engagement. Technical implementation involves updating the fitness calculation at the end of matches to factor in `distance_traveled` and `damage_dealt`, dynamically adjusting generation weights for neural balls.

tasks.title: Night and Day Arena
tasks.description: An arena that cycles between day and night phases. During the day, vision is unlimited and attack power is slightly buffed. During the night, vision is severely restricted, but speed is increased and stealth behaviors become more effective. This forces balls to dynamically switch between aggressive and defensive tactics.

tasks.title: Vampire Ball Type
tasks.description: A new ball type that heals itself for a percentage of the damage it deals to enemies. It has low base HP but high attack speed, making it dangerous in prolonged 1v1 fights but weak against burst damage or crowd control.

tasks.title: Ultimate Charge Resource
tasks.description: Add a new class-specific resource called 'charge' that builds up when dealing or receiving damage, enabling a powerful ultimate skill once full. Technical implementation involves adding a `charge_level` state to the ball entity and updating the action scoring logic within `src/ai/decision.py` to dramatically increase the score for 'use_skill' when `charge_level >= 100`.

tasks.title: Mimic Ball Type
tasks.description: A unique ball that starts with average stats and no skill. Upon killing an enemy or staying near them for a certain duration, it permanently copies the enemy's skill and slightly adjusts its stats to match. The Mimic's strategy is to survive early and hunt down high-value targets to copy their abilities.

tasks.title: Conveyor Belt Hazard
tasks.description: Introduce a dynamic environmental hazard that shifts balls in a specific vector direction without altering their internal velocity. Technical implementation requires adding a `ConveyorBelt` subclass to `ProceduralArena.Hazard` in `src/arena/arena_types.py` with `direction_vector` and `speed_magnitude` properties, applying positional offsets in the game tick physics loop.

tasks.title: Post-Match Death Heatmap Analytics
tasks.description: Generate visual heatmaps overlaid on the arena after a match concludes to show death densities and choke points. Technical implementation requires maintaining an array of `death_coordinates` during gameplay and passing this data to a Godot shader material that renders radial gradients onto a UI overlay texture.

tasks.title: Kiting Specializations
tasks.description: Add varying kite distances depending on specific ball traits, e.g. Sniper kites at max range while a Skirmisher kites closely.

tasks.title: Kite Dynamic Retreat
tasks.description: Allow kiting balls to drop small traps or obstacles when retreating from faster enemies.

tasks.title: Custom Neural Skill Input Node Editor
tasks.description: Create a visual configuration interface in the UI (or simple JSON mapping system) where players can choose which inputs their custom Neural Ball has access to. Instead of standard HP, Aggression, Kills, and Timer, they could pipe in variables like Nearest Enemy Distance, Number of Allies, Boss HP, or Map Hazard Distance, to allow for custom fine-tuned Neural strategies.

tasks.title: Neural Ball Deep Evolution Mode
tasks.description: Introduce a game mode where only Neural Balls compete. After each round, a genetic algorithm breeds the top performing Neural Balls (combining their hidden and output weights) and mutates a fraction of the offspring to see which configuration converges on the optimal strategy. It would provide an evolutionary simulation angle to the game.

tasks.title: Interactive Danger Heatmap UI Overlay
tasks.description: Visualize the `danger_grid` as a heatmap overlay in the spectator or coach mode UI. High danger areas will pulse in red, while safe zones appear green. This provides players with better insight into the AI's real-time risk assessment and movement decisions.

tasks.title: Danger Zones Arena Mutator
tasks.description: Introduce a new mutator where dynamic 'danger zones' spawn periodically on the map, registering as high values in the `danger_grid`. Balls must use the updated A* obstacle avoidance to navigate around these invisible traps or suffer massive damage if they traverse them.

tasks.title: Vampire Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where all balls slowly lose HP over time but regain HP when dealing damage or killing others. The last one standing wins.

tasks.title: King of the Hill
tasks.description: A game mode where a specific designated area in the center of the arena grants points to the balls inside it. The ball with the most points when the timer ends wins.

tasks.title: Black Hole Survival Mode
tasks.description: A mode where the entire arena is slowly sucked into a massive black hole.

tasks.title: Gravity Wells
tasks.description: Temporary gravity wells spawn randomly and pull balls towards them.

tasks.title: Trap Customization Sandbox
tasks.description: Add a pre-game lobby where Snipers can pick trap variants like poison traps that apply DoT or stun traps that fully halt enemies for 1 second instead of slowing.

tasks.title: Global Traps Game Mode
tasks.description: Create a new game mode where the entire arena starts littered with invisible traps, testing players' memory and movement caution rather than just dodging enemy shots.

tasks.title: Decoy Booster Trap
tasks.description: A new procedural hazard that spawns looking exactly like a random booster. When a ball tries to collect it, it explodes and deals damage instead of granting a buff. Scouts could have a chance to identify them based on their perception score.

tasks.title: Fog of War Weather Event
tasks.description: Periodically, the arena could fill with a thick fog that severely reduces the perception radius of all balls for 15-20 seconds. This would force balls into more close-range surprise encounters and make abilities like the ninja's stealth even more effective.

tasks.title: Combo Abilities System
tasks.description: Implement a synergy mechanic where combining specific skills from different ball types (e.g., water attack + lightning attack) creates enhanced combo effects like area paralysis or bonus damage, encouraging team coordination and diverse team compositions.

tasks.title: Variable Gravity Anomalies
tasks.description: Introduce spatial anomalies that periodically alter the gravity in specific zones of the arena, affecting movement speed, trajectory of skills, and forcing players/AI to adapt their pathfinding and engagement strategies dynamically.

tasks.title: Weather Effects
tasks.description: Add dynamic weather that impacts ball physics.

tasks.title: Boss Encounters
tasks.description: Introduce powerful boss balls in the center of the arena.

tasks.title: Necromancer ball type - raises minions
tasks.description: A new ball type that can revive recently killed enemies as temporary weak minions to fight for it. Minions slowly decay in HP over time.

tasks.title: Poison Trap Hazard
tasks.description: A new procedural hazard that applies a damage-over-time effect to any ball that passes through it, reducing their HP continuously for several ticks even after they leave the trap.

tasks.title: King of the Hill Mode
tasks.description: Add a new game mode where teams score points by maintaining position within a central moving zone. Balls will need entirely new AI prioritization to value zone presence over raw damage.

tasks.title: Interactive Hazards
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic hazards like explosive barrels or spike traps that balls can push into enemies or trigger manually via skills to create area denial zones.

tasks.title: Weather Events
tasks.description: Introduce random weather events (e.g. rain, snow, sandstorm) that dynamically affect arena hazards and ball visibility, forcing AI to adapt on the fly.

tasks.title: Team Objectives
tasks.description: Add capture points or secondary objectives that reward surviving teams with global buffs, encouraging teamwork over pure deathmatch behavior.

tasks.title: Portal Hazards
tasks.description: Add a new hazard called Portal which instantly teleports a ball that touches it to a paired Portal location.

tasks.title: Healing Springs
tasks.description: Add a new dynamic area called HealingSprings which works opposite to hazards: if a ball stays in this area, they slowly regenerate HP.

tasks.title: Team Allegiance Betrayal
tasks.description: Add a new mechanic where specific ball types can manipulate enemies into temporarily betraying their own team, fighting alongside the manipulator for a short duration before returning to normal.

tasks.title: Weather Events System
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic weather events (rain, snow, sandstorms) that occur periodically during a match, affecting ball physics such as movement speed, vision range, and attack accuracy.

tasks.title: Weapon-Specific Kiting Behaviors
tasks.description: Balls with short cooldown fast attacks can kite constantly, while balls with slow high-damage attacks pause to shoot and then reposition, bringing a stutter-step mechanic to combat.

tasks.title: Dynamic Kite Pathfinding
tasks.description: Improve kiting logic to not just run directly backward but find a path that avoids getting cornered by moving sideways or toward open spaces in the arena.

tasks.title: Decoy Spawning
tasks.description: Allow fragile fast balls to deploy a temporary decoy ball that enemies will aggro towards, allowing the real ball to escape or reposition.

tasks.title: Smoke Screen Traps
tasks.description: Allow certain ball types to drop smoke screens that reduce enemy perception range while standing in them or line of sight through them.

tasks.title: Neural Skill Customization
tasks.description: Instead of a static skill like 'numpy', let the neural ball choose from a variety of skills (Dash, Shield, Heal) prior to battle, and provide the chosen skill as an input to the neural network so the network learns to adapt its playstyle according to the equipped skill.

tasks.title: Custom Neural Training Environments
tasks.description: Allow players to spawn custom training arenas with specific scenarios (e.g. 5 juggernauts with no weapons, or maze-like maps with traps) where they can rapidly run neuroevolution specifically tailored to those situations to generate specialized neural balls before sending them to the main battle royale.

tasks.title: Skill Tree Meta-Progression
tasks.description: Players earn skill points across matches to unlock passive bonuses or new types of balls permanently for their profile.

tasks.title: Weather Effects Simulator
tasks.description: Add dynamic weather during matches (e.g., rain makes the arena slippery and affects movement physics, fog limits perception radius).

tasks.title: Destructible Terrain
tasks.description: Walls and rooms can be broken using explosive abilities.

tasks.title: Profile Prestige System
tasks.description: Once players unlock all balls and max out all passive bonuses, they can 'prestige' to reset their progress in exchange for a special cosmetic aura and a permanent 5% increase to base stats.

tasks.title: Daily Quests for Skill Points
tasks.description: Players receive random daily quests (e.g., 'Survive for 5 minutes', 'Defeat 10 enemies with sniper ball') that reward extra skill points to accelerate profile progression.

tasks.title: Interactive Training Mode
tasks.description: Allow user to fight against learning networks to shape their strategy.

tasks.title: Custom Neural Skins
tasks.description: Skins for balls based on generation performance.

tasks.title: Sync GDScript: Implement 'get_weights' in decision.gd
tasks.description: The Python class in decision.py implements 'get_weights', but the GDScript counterpart decision.gd is missing it. Please implement the same logic in GDScript.

tasks.title: Expanding Danger Zones
tasks.description: Danger zones not only spawn dynamically but slowly expand over time before disappearing, forcing a continuous change in safe paths and encouraging more dynamic movement.

tasks.title: Danger Zone Powerups
tasks.description: Balls can collect a specific powerup that makes them immune to Danger Zones for a short time, allowing them to use the zones for shortcuts or to escape pursuers.

tasks.title: Decoy Flare Mechanism
tasks.description: Introduce a deployable flare hazard that draws AI targeting logic, causing balls to attack the decoy instead of actual opponents for a short duration.

tasks.title: Stamina Based Dashing
tasks.description: Add a stamina meter that allows balls to dash short distances to dodge attacks or gap-close, regenerating when moving slowly or standing still.

tasks.title: Teleporter hazards
tasks.description: Add a new hazard kind 'teleporter' that when a ball steps on it, they are instantly transported to another random teleporter on the map or a random safe location, potentially dodging an attack or losing their target.

tasks.title: Reverse Controls Modifier
tasks.description: A random event that happens mid-game, reversing the movement logic for all balls for 10 seconds, forcing them to adapt their AI vectors.

tasks.title: Teleportation Portals
tasks.description: Special hazards that don't deal damage but teleport the ball to another random portal on the map, allowing for surprise flanks.

tasks.title: Shrinking King of the Hill Zone
tasks.description: Make the King of the Hill zone gradually shrink as the game progresses, forcing players closer together and intensifying the fights for control in the center.

tasks.title: Multi-Zone Domination Mode
tasks.description: Instead of a single central zone, add three separate zones scattered across the arena that grant points. Players must split up their focus and defend multiple areas simultaneously.

tasks.title: EMP Trap Variant
tasks.description: Introduce an EMP trap variant that disables enemies' abilities and removes all positive buffs (like speed boosts) for 2 seconds instead of dealing direct damage or stun, useful against highly aggressive ball types.

tasks.title: Sniper Ricochet Trap
tasks.description: Add a new trap variant 'ricochet' for Snipers, which bounces enemy attacks back towards the attacker when placed, giving Snipers a temporary defensive barrier while kiting.

tasks.title: Mirror Shield
tasks.description: A temporary shield that reflects the first source of damage back to the attacker or trap.

tasks.title: Trap Detector Drone
tasks.description: A drone item that floats around the ball and highlights nearby traps, including fake boosters.

tasks.title: Elemental Synergies
tasks.description: Combine elemental skills for chain reactions.

tasks.title: Map Weather Dynamics
tasks.description: Weather conditions change throughout the match, affecting stats.

tasks.title: Portal Mechanics
tasks.description: Add pairs of portals in the arena. If a ball enters one portal, it instantly teleports to the other portal, preserving momentum.

tasks.title: Laser Traps
tasks.description: Introduce spinning laser traps that periodically turn on and off, dealing heavy damage to any ball caught in the beam.

tasks.title: Weather Effects in the Arena
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic weather effects like rain, snow, or wind that randomly occur during matches. Rain could reduce friction making balls slide more, snow could slow down movement, and strong winds could slightly alter trajectories or push balls in a specific direction. These effects would force players and AI to adapt their movement and strategies on the fly.

tasks.title: Payload Escort Mode
tasks.description: Introduce an Escort Mode where one team has to defend a slow-moving, high-HP 'payload' ball as it travels across the map to a designated goal. The other team tries to destroy it. This encourages formation fighting and continuous frontline pushing.

tasks.title: Random Map Events
tasks.description: Periodically trigger random arena-wide events during matches, such as a localized meteor shower, sudden gravity changes, or moving walls. This will force players to adapt their positioning and prioritize surviving the environment along with enemy balls, keeping gameplay dynamic.

tasks.title: Wall Bounce Mechanism
tasks.description: Allow balls to use walls to bounce their attacks off or perform ricochet maneuvers to reach enemies behind obstacles.

tasks.title: Prestige Mutators
tasks.description: After hitting Prestige Level 5, players unlock 'Mutator Options' for their custom matches, allowing them to apply fun physics changes (like zero gravity or explosive collisions) in private games.

tasks.title: Arena Traps
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic traps in the arena that are triggered by proximity, dealing damage or slowing down balls that step on them.

tasks.title: Weather Effects on Arena
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic weather effects like rain, snow, or fog that affect visibility, friction, and movement speed.

tasks.title: Seasonal Prestige Rankings
tasks.description: Introduce seasonal leaderboards specifically tracking prestige levels. Players who achieve the highest prestige levels during a 30-day season receive unique, untradable cosmetic crowns and seasonal titles.

tasks.title: Interactive Arena Elements
tasks.description: Add interactive objects scattered throughout the arena, such as breakable walls, explosive barrels, or bounce pads. Breakable walls could provide temporary cover that deteriorates under attack, explosive barrels could deal area-of-effect damage if detonated, and bounce pads could launch balls across the map for quick escapes or surprise attacks, adding a layer of tactical environmental usage.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement Modules
tasks.description: Allow balls to 'entangle' with each other or specific arena features. When one entangled entity is damaged or moves, the other experiences a proportionate effect, introducing entirely new risk/reward mechanics and team synergy opportunities.

tasks.title: Teleportation Pads
tasks.description: Place teleportation pads in procedural arenas that instantly transport balls to another linked pad.

tasks.title: Consumable Trap Items
tasks.description: Allow players to pick up and place consumable traps like landmines or freeze traps to control the arena.

tasks.title: Chronos Zones
tasks.description: Spawn temporal rifts that slow down or speed up the passage of time (affecting movement, attack cooldowns, and hazard ticks) only for entities within the rift, creating high-skill prediction windows.

tasks.title: Weather Systems
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic weather to arenas that affect physics and perception. For example, rain could make the terrain slippery (increasing drift) and reduce perception range for AI balls, while wind could constantly apply a slight directional force to all balls, requiring AI to adapt to the changing environment.

tasks.title: King of the Hill Game Mode
tasks.description: A new team-based or free-for-all mode where balls earn points by staying inside a dynamically moving circular zone on the map. The neural networks would have to be retrained to prioritize positional control and defending a stationary spot rather than pure survival or aggressive hunting.

tasks.title: Skin Tiers VFX
tasks.description: Add unique visual effects and particle trails based on the ball's skin tier (veteran, elite, legendary) during dashes and skill uses to make higher generation balls stand out.

tasks.title: Dynamic Weather System
tasks.description: Add a weather system that changes dynamically during matches, affecting ball movement, visibility, or hazard types. E.g., rain makes surfaces slippery, while thunderstorms create random lightning strikes.

tasks.title: Level Up Skill Tree
tasks.description: Introduce a mid-match level-up system where balls earn experience by dealing damage or capturing objectives, allowing them to choose perks or upgrade their base stats like speed, max HP, or damage dynamically.

tasks.title: Skin Specific Perks
tasks.description: Introduce minor passive perks tied to skins. For example, 'veteran' skins gain a 2% resistance to status effects, while 'legendary' skins generate a slight passive aura.

tasks.title: Random Teleporters
tasks.description: Add random teleporter pads to the arena that instantly move a ball to another random pad.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zone Mode
tasks.description: A battle royale mode where the safe zone gradually shrinks, and balls take continuous damage outside of it.

tasks.title: Draft Mode (Pick and Ban Phase)
tasks.description: Before the start of a Royale match, teams take turns picking ball types and banning ball types, creating strategic synergies and denying counter-comps to the opponent teams.

tasks.title: Revenge Nemesis Mechanic
tasks.description: If a ball eliminates the same enemy multiple times across different matches (tracked via persistent profile data), they become Nemeses. In future matches, the Nemesis enemy deals 20% bonus damage to their rival, but yields double points/charge level upon being defeated.

tasks.title: Weather Effects (Rain/Snow/Wind)
tasks.description: Dynamic weather events that change physics (e.g. wind pushes balls, rain makes surface slippery/increases dash range but reduces steering, snow slows down balls and applies chill stacks that occasionally freeze balls for 1 second).

tasks.title: Dynamic Map Hazards
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic map hazards such as lava pits or rolling boulders that appear and move across the arena periodically.

tasks.title: Decoy Trap
tasks.description: A new trap variant that creates a holographic clone of the placing ball. The clone moves erratically to draw enemy aggro and explodes for minor area-of-effect damage when destroyed.

tasks.title: Zone Modifiers
tasks.description: Introduce zones with different modifiers (e.g. speed boost, damage boost, healing) that balls can fight over.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Booster
tasks.description: A rare consumable booster that temporarily imbues the ball's attacks with chain lightning. The attack jumps to up to 2 additional nearby enemies, dealing 50% damage to secondary targets.

tasks.title: EMP Grenade Item
tasks.description: An item that, when collected, disables nearby enemy drones, shields, and temporary speed boosters for a short duration.

tasks.title: Camouflage Drone Skill
tasks.description: A variant of the drone that temporarily masks the player's presence from enemies outside a very short radius, making them drop aggro.

tasks.title: Decoy Ball Type
tasks.description: A ball type that periodically spawns static copies of itself to confuse enemies and escape danger.

tasks.title: Night Mode
tasks.description: A variant mode where visibility is severely reduced, relying on a narrow cone of light or sonar-like pulses for perception.

tasks.title: Portal Nodes Game Mode
tasks.description: Players must find and capture active portal nodes. Controlling a portal continuously drains other teams' score, but the active portal relocates randomly around the arena every 10 seconds.

tasks.title: Shrinking Arena Edge Effect
tasks.description: To supplement shrinking zones, visually restrict the playable arena size by destroying the arena walls from the outside in, pushing all objects physically towards the center over time.

tasks.title: Bounty Hunter Mode
tasks.description: At the start of the match, one ball on each team is randomly selected as the 'Bounty'. If the Bounty is destroyed, the opposing team gains a massive global stat buff and extra skill points. Teams must balance defending their Bounty while hunting the enemy's.

tasks.title: Portal Modifier items
tasks.description: Items or boosters that allow players to throw a temporary exit portal anywhere on the arena, acting as a tactical escape hatch for a short duration.

tasks.title: Blackout Protocol Event
tasks.description: Periodically during matches, the entire arena goes dark except for a small radius around each ball and objective. This forces close-quarters combat, increases the value of scout-type balls, and adds tension as players cannot see long-range threats.

tasks.title: Black Hole Synergy
tasks.description: Portals could occasionally spawn linked to moving Black Hole hazards, so a ball that enters a portal could be launched out of the Black Hole, combining hazard behaviors dynamically.

tasks.title: Chain Reaction Explosions
tasks.description: When an explosion hits a specific hazard like lava or poison cloud, it triggers a secondary elemental explosion spreading the effect over a larger area.

tasks.title: Destructible Hazards
tasks.description: Allow powerful skills like explosion or ground_pound to permanently destroy hazards such as spikes and fake boosters, temporarily clearing a safe path.

tasks.title: Gravity Mine Trap
tasks.description: A new trap type that, when triggered, creates a small black hole that pulls nearby balls towards it for a short duration.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Skill
tasks.description: A new skill that strikes an enemy with lightning which then arcs to up to 3 nearby enemies, dealing reduced damage on each bounce.

tasks.title: Weather effects on perception
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic weather (e.g., rain, sandstorm) that periodically changes perception rules globally during a match, such as reducing perception range or slowly damaging fast-moving entities.

tasks.title: Decoy explosions
tasks.description: When a Trickster's decoy expires or takes fatal damage, it detonates and deals AoE damage, confusing enemies and opening opportunities for counter-attacks.

tasks.title: Ball Loadouts
tasks.description: Allow players to save customized sets of pre-game selections, preferred bonuses, and trap variants to quickly jump into matches with their favorite setups.

tasks.title: Corpse Explosion
tasks.description: Instead of reanimating the dead, this skill targets a recently dead ball and causes it to explode, dealing AoE damage proportional to its max HP.

tasks.title: Seasonal Tournaments
tasks.description: Introduce monthly or seasonal tournaments where players compete for exclusive cosmetic ball skins and unique status effects.

tasks.title: Summoner Class
tasks.description: A ball type that actively summons weak but plentiful elemental minions over time rather than reanimating dead ones, creating small armies.

tasks.title: Weather specific buffs
tasks.description: Balls gain specific buffs during certain weather conditions, such as 'Fire' balls dealing more damage in clear weather or 'Water' balls healing slightly in the rain.

tasks.title: Weather specific hazards
tasks.description: Introduce hazards that only spawn during certain weather conditions, like tornadoes during wind storms or lightning strikes during rain.

tasks.title: Bumper Balls
tasks.description: A new mode where balls deal zero damage but bounce each other with much higher knockback, aiming to push opponents off the arena.

tasks.title: Shrinking Danger Zones
tasks.description: Introduce a shrinking danger zone mode where the safe area slowly decreases, forcing players into close-quarters combat.

tasks.title: Zone Control Points
tasks.description: Add control points that occasionally become danger zones if held by the same team for too long.

tasks.title: Prestige Tokens
tasks.description: When resetting for prestige, players also gain Prestige Tokens based on their past stats to unlock permanent minor upgrades across all balls.

tasks.title: Season Modifiers
tasks.description: Each 30-day season introduces a unique global modifier, like 20% faster movement speed or reduced cooldowns for specific ball classes.

tasks.title: Decoy Ball
tasks.description: A new ball type that creates a static decoy of itself. Enemies get confused and attack the decoy, wasting their skills and cooldowns.

tasks.title: Randomizer Mutator
tasks.description: A mutator where every 10 seconds, all balls have their stats randomly re-rolled and ball type changed.

tasks.title: Floor is Lava Mutator
tasks.description: A mutator where balls constantly take damage over time, unless they collect temporary immune boosters spawning around the map.

tasks.title: Black Hole Gravity Scaling
tasks.description: Increase the gravity pull strength of the black hole hazard over time, until it pulls all balls in the arena, creating an intense end-game mechanic.

tasks.title: Meteor Shower
tasks.description: Meteors fall randomly on the arena, destroying cover and leaving crater hazards.

tasks.title: Tornado Weather
tasks.description: A tornado moves across the arena, pulling balls in and applying damage over time.

tasks.title: Sudden Death Overtime Hazards
tasks.description: If a match reaches the time limit or zone closure, introduce extreme hazards like meteor showers or random gravity inversions instead of instantly ending the game, allowing the remaining balls to showcase their dodging mechanics.

tasks.title: Interactive Crowd System
tasks.description: Add a virtual crowd around the arena that reacts dynamically to epic kills, comebacks, and team wipes, modifying game audio and sometimes throwing small temporary buffs (like a single-use speed pad) into the arena to help losing balls.

tasks.title: Trap Hazards
tasks.description: Add new hidden traps to arenas that trigger when a ball moves over them, applying a slow or damage over time effect.

tasks.title: Energy Siphon Link
tasks.description: An active ability that allows a support class to link their health to an ally, slowly draining their own HP to heal the ally over time, creating dynamic tethering lines in the visualizer.

tasks.title: Quantum Teleportation Trap
tasks.description: A new hazard that instantly swaps the positions of any two entities that step on paired portal traps simultaneously, disrupting formations and leading to unexpected emergent encounters.

tasks.title: Decoy Booster
tasks.description: A new booster that spawns a temporary decoy of the ball that collected it, distracting enemies and absorbing incoming damage for a few seconds.

tasks.title: Ricochet Arena Hazards
tasks.description: Introduce bumpers in the arena that don't deal damage but strongly bounce balls and projectiles in random directions, adding chaos and forcing players to adapt their movement.

tasks.title: Bumper Walls
tasks.description: Add bouncy bumper hazards to the arena that significantly reflect and accelerate balls on collision, creating chaotic pinball-like movement.

tasks.title: Heatwave Weather Event
tasks.description: Introduce a 'heatwave' weather event where max speed is slightly reduced across the board due to overheating, but a new 'mirage' effect occasionally creates harmless illusionary clones of the balls to confuse AI targeting systems.

tasks.title: Tornado Hazard
tasks.description: A random tornado spawns occasionally during the thunderstorm weather event. It acts as a dynamic hazard that pulls nearby balls towards it and launches them in a random direction, causing minor damage upon landing and resetting their movement.

tasks.title: Wind Gust Weather Event
tasks.description: Periodically pushes all balls in a random direction, forcing them to constantly adjust movement to stay on target.

tasks.title: Weather Synergies
tasks.description: Certain ball types gain unique buffs during specific weather conditions. E.g., Fireball takes damage in rain, but Iceball moves faster in snow.

tasks.title: Global Weather Announcements
tasks.description: Add UI notifications or commentary when weather changes, giving players time to adapt.

tasks.title: EMP Grenades
tasks.description: A new ball skill that disables the skills and dash abilities of all nearby balls for a short duration, forcing pure movement and attack battles.

tasks.title: Hologram Decoy Skill
tasks.description: A skill that leaves behind a fake copy of the ball that absorbs one hit or confuses enemy AI.

tasks.title: King of the Hill - Dynamic Safe Zone
tasks.description: A game mode where the safe zone constantly moves around the map and shrinks, forcing players into intense close-quarters combat as they try to stay inside.

tasks.title: Weaponized Hazards
tasks.description: Allow specific ball types, like Elementalists or Brawlers, to grab and throw map hazards (e.g. lava rocks, spike traps) at enemies for burst damage.

tasks.title: Time Stop Skill
tasks.description: A rare ultimate skill that freezes all other balls and dynamic hazards for 2 seconds, allowing the user to reposition or secure critical hits without retaliation.

tasks.title: Magnetize Powerup
tasks.description: A new powerup that temporarily draws nearby smaller hazards or other powerups towards the player, making it easier to gather resources but also increasing the risk of pulling in dangerous objects.

tasks.title: Quicksand Hazard
tasks.description: Add a new hazard called quicksand that spawns dynamically in the arena during the game. Balls that wander into the quicksand are slowed down significantly, and taking damage from other hazards while inside quicksand amplifies the damage.

tasks.title: Mirage Ability
tasks.description: Introduce a new Mirage ability for some ball types that allows them to create false copies of themselves when weather conditions are foggy or sandstorming. This will confuse the enemies by giving them fake targets to attack.

tasks.title: Reflect shield visual effect
tasks.description: Add a visual particle effect when the reflect shield reflects damage, creating a pulse originating from the shield and traveling towards the attacker.

tasks.title: Shield breaking mechanism
tasks.description: Currently the reflect shield reflects the first damage and is consumed. Allow the shield to have a maximum damage capacity so it can reflect multiple small hits before breaking.

tasks.title: Reverse EMP item
tasks.description: An item that temporarily increases the cooldowns of nearby enemies, preventing them from using skills or attacking for a short time.

tasks.title: Vampiric Drain booster
tasks.description: A booster that links you to the nearest enemy for 5 seconds, draining their HP and giving it to you as long as you stay within range.

tasks.title: Interactive Environmental Traps
tasks.description: Introduce switches that balls can hit or roll over to trigger environmental traps like falling boulders, swinging axes, or temporary laser walls that damage or block opponents.

tasks.title: Magnetic Hazards
tasks.description: Add magnetic hazards that continuously pull or push balls depending on their active polarity. Balls could change their own polarity using a specific skill to either use the hazard for a speed boost or avoid being dragged in.

tasks.title: Decoy Ball Skill
tasks.description: A new skill that creates an AI-controlled illusion of the ball that deals no damage but taunts nearby enemies into attacking it, absorbing one hit before exploding.

tasks.title: Fog of War Mode
tasks.description: Similar to vision reduced mode but a completely dark screen with only a cone of light matching the AI's actual perception radius.

tasks.title: Invisibility Cloak Item
tasks.description: A new collectable item that drastically reduces the collector's radius for perception by other balls for a limited time.

tasks.title: Orbital Laser Strike Hazard
tasks.description: A new procedural arena hazard that paints a large target area on the ground for 3 seconds before dealing massive localized damage and applying a strong outward knockback.

tasks.title: Gravity well
tasks.description: A hazard that pulls players towards it

tasks.title: Windstorm
tasks.description: Pushes all players in a random direction

tasks.title: Kamikaze Drone Variant
tasks.description: An aggressive drone variant that homes in on the nearest enemy and explodes, dealing moderate AoE damage but destroying the drone.

tasks.title: Decoy Drone Variant
tasks.description: A drone variant that creates a temporary clone of the player to distract enemies, drawing aggro while the player escapes.

tasks.title: Meteor Strike Hazard
tasks.description: Random meteor hazards drop into the arena causing AoE damage and leaving fire zones.

tasks.title: New Weather Type: Earthquake
tasks.description: Periodically shakes the screen and applies a random impulse vector to all entities, disrupting aiming and movement patterns temporarily.

tasks.title: Blackout Mode
tasks.description: Periodically, the arena goes completely dark, reducing vision drastically for all balls.

tasks.title: Weather-Specific Equipment
tasks.description: Introduces new loadout items (e.g. 'Mud Tires', 'Thermal Goggles') that specifically counteract penalties applied by rain or fog respectively.

tasks.title: Stamina Potions
tasks.description: Add a new booster item that immediately replenishes a ball's stamina to 100% and grants brief infinite stamina.

tasks.title: Dash Attack Skill
tasks.description: Add a skill for certain ball types that lets them consume all stamina to dash through enemies, dealing heavy damage.

tasks.title: Exhaustion Effect
tasks.description: Balls with 0 stamina are briefly exhausted, slowing their base speed and lowering their damage until stamina regenerates to at least 20%.

tasks.title: Heavy Attacks
tasks.description: Balls can consume all their stamina for a single heavy attack that deals massive damage and knocks the enemy back.

tasks.title: Night Vision Goggles Powerup
tasks.description: A new collectible powerup that spawns during Battle Royale matches. When collected, the ball's base_perception_radius is greatly increased and it becomes immune to the vision reduction of dark phases, giving it a massive tactical advantage during the blackout.

tasks.title: Flare Gun Skill
tasks.description: Add a new 'flare' active skill that certain ball types (like scout or a new 'spotter' class) can use during dark phases. The flare shoots to a target location and acts as a temporary light source, restoring vision in a large radius around it and revealing any hidden enemies in its area of effect for 5 seconds.

tasks.title: Weather System
tasks.description: Add dynamic weather that affects perception radius and ball movement speed.

tasks.title: Decay Zones
tasks.description: Certain areas of the map apply a temporary max HP debuff to entities inside them, making tanky balls vulnerable during late-game engagements.

tasks.title: Quantum Tunnels Hazard
tasks.description: Hazards that teleport balls to the other side of the arena, keeping their momentum but altering their trajectory unpredictably.

tasks.title: Hazard Conversion Module
tasks.description: Introduce a new skill 'Convert Hazard' that temporarily changes a dangerous hazard (like spikes or a fake booster) into a healing spring or a real booster for the ball that uses it. This adds strategic utility to typically avoided areas and rewards risk-taking.

tasks.title: Tornado Weather Effect
tasks.description: Add a tornado weather effect that spawns a small dynamic hazard that slowly moves around the map and sucks in balls that get too close, dealing damage and applying a dizzy effect (randomized controls) for a short duration.

tasks.title: Seasonal Arenas
tasks.description: Introduce seasonal procedural arenas where the default weather and environmental hazards are fixed based on the season (e.g. Winter Arena has permanent snow and ice patches, Summer Arena has extreme heat that drains stamina faster).

tasks.title: Dynamic Safe Zone Migration
tasks.description: Instead of the safe zone merely shrinking toward the center of the arena, make the safe zone's center slowly migrate around the arena as it shrinks. This forces players to constantly reposition and prevents them from simply camping the exact center early in the game.

tasks.title: Shrinking Zone Collapse Event
tasks.description: At the very end of the match when the shrinking zone reaches its minimum radius, trigger a sudden 'Collapse Event' where the zone collapses entirely into a single point, dramatically increasing damage and pulling all remaining balls inward with a strong gravitational force to force an immediate winner.

tasks.title: Time of Day Cycle
tasks.description: Add a dynamic time-of-day cycle to matches. As it transitions from day to night, perception radii for all balls could decrease unless they have a 'night vision' trait. Certain ball types like 'vampire' could gain stat boosts at night.

tasks.title: Destructible Terrain / Hazards
tasks.description: Introduce arena hazards or obstacles that can be destroyed after taking enough damage. This would allow players/AI to carve new paths or intentionally drop hazards onto enemies.

tasks.title: Decoy Powerup
tasks.description: Add a new powerup that allows a ball to spawn a visual clone of itself. The decoy will move around randomly or towards enemies to confuse them, while the real ball can reposition or attack safely.

tasks.title: Poison Cloud Area
tasks.description: A hazard that slowly expands and deals low damage to balls inside it, while occasionally debuffing their movement speed.

tasks.title: Decoy Illusion Trap
tasks.description: Trickster's decoys can occasionally apply a visual distortion 'illusion' effect to enemies near them upon expiration, randomizing their perception so they momentarily see allies as enemies, leading to friendly fire incidents.

tasks.title: Swap Decoy Ability
tasks.description: Allow the Trickster to swap positions with their active decoy once before it expires. This gives them incredible mobility and the ability to pull off confusing jukes or escape lethal scenarios.

tasks.title: Necromancer Minion Synergy
tasks.description: Introduce synergy mechanics for the Necromancer ball. When near its generated minions, the Necromancer gains increased movement speed and its attacks heal itself for a percentage of the damage dealt.

tasks.title: Quantum Teleport Trap
tasks.description: Add a new trap hazard that, when triggered, instantly swaps the positions of the victim and the trap's owner, disorienting enemies and allowing for creative escapes.

tasks.title: Aura Stacking Buffs
tasks.description: Balls emit a small aura based on their ball type. When multiple friendly balls of different types are close to each other, their auras stack, granting passive buffs (like increased health regen, damage reduction, or speed) to all balls within the combined radius. This encourages tighter group formations and diverse team compositions.

tasks.title: Weaponized Portals & Portal Gun Item
tasks.description: Add an active item (Portal Gun) that allows balls to shoot two linked portals onto the map on demand. Players can use this to strategically reposition or bait enemies into falling through and getting ambushed.

tasks.title: Hazard Trajectories & Moving Portals
tasks.description: Introduce dynamic portal hazards that move around the map using random trajectories, making it harder for players to predict when they might get sucked in and teleported to a dangerous situation.

tasks.title: Loadout Sharing
tasks.description: Allow players to share their custom loadouts with friends or the community using short codes, similar to deck sharing in card games.

tasks.title: Random Loadout Option
tasks.description: Add a 'Random' loadout selection that picks a random unlocked ball type and trap variant to provide an extra challenge with bonus rewards.

tasks.title: Bait Traps
tasks.description: Allow stealth-based or trap-focused balls to place fake booster items that explode or stun enemies when collected, adding a psychological layer to item collection.

tasks.title: Vampiric Drain Zone
tasks.description: An arena hazard that deals small damage over time to any ball inside it, and uses the total damage dealt to heal the ball with the lowest HP on the map.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zone with Moving Center
tasks.description: Make the safe zone center drift over time in a random direction, forcing players to constantly reposition as it shrinks rather than simply converging on a static point.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement Skill
tasks.description: A new skill that allows a ball to randomly link to another ball. Any damage taken by one is shared equally between both, but buffs are also shared. Perfect for strategic chaos.

tasks.title: Clone Wars Game Mode
tasks.description: A new game mode where every ball starts with the 'clone' skill. The map gets filled with clones rapidly, making it a chaotic battle of finding the real enemy amidst a sea of static copies.

tasks.title: Decoy Ball Hazard
tasks.description: Spawn a fake 'Decoy' ball hazard that mimics the appearance of a real player but explodes or triggers a stun trap when attacked or collided with by a real player.

tasks.title: Weather Synergy Combos
tasks.description: Combine weather hazards with ball skills, e.g. elemental burst during rain to freeze everything.

tasks.title: Exploding Clones Skill Upgrade
tasks.description: An evolution for the clone skill where clones act as proximity mines. If an enemy touches a static clone, it explodes dealing area of effect damage.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Enhancements
tasks.description: Improve chain lightning to bounce off walls or objects and increase damage with each jump.

tasks.title: Prestige Token Shop
tasks.description: A dedicated UI shop where players can spend prestige tokens not just on permanent minor stats, but also on unique run mutators, special starting artifacts, and unlocking rare AI ball archetypes (like a Time-Mage ball).

tasks.title: Season-specific visual themes for the arena
tasks.description: Each season could alter the visual look of the arena (e.g. Winter theme for Season 1, Lava theme for Season 2, Neon theme for Season 3) to provide a fresh experience and tie into the global modifier (e.g. ice patches for speed, lava cracks for damage).

tasks.title: Shrinking Labyrinth Mode
tasks.description: A new game mode where the arena starts as a complex maze that slowly shifts and shrinks. Walls deal damage, forcing balls to navigate carefully while fighting for survival in an ever-tightening space.

tasks.title: Gravity Wells Mode
tasks.description: A mode where random gravity wells spawn in the arena, pulling nearby balls towards their center and slightly damaging them over time.

tasks.title: Season leaderboards with exclusive rewards
tasks.description: At the end of each 30-day season, the top 100 players on the leaderboard could receive exclusive cosmetic items (like a special aura or crown) and a unique title based on that season's theme to incentivize competitive play.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement Hazard
tasks.description: A new hazard type that links two balls together. If one takes damage or gets a status effect, the other receives a fraction of it. It requires coordination to break the link by moving far enough apart or finding a cleanser item.

tasks.title: Pinball Bumpers
tasks.description: Add stationary hazards that act as pinball bumpers. Whenever a ball hits one, it deals no damage but bounces them away with immense speed.

tasks.title: Decoy Projection Skill
tasks.description: A new skill that creates an illusionary clone of the ball. The clone deals no damage but mimics the player's movement, confusing enemies and drawing their attacks. The clone vanishes after absorbing a set amount of damage or after a duration expires.

tasks.title: EMC Burst Hazard
tasks.description: An Electromagnetic Pulse burst hazard that periodically spawns in the arena. When it detonates, it temporarily scrambles the AI targeting logic of any ball within its radius, causing them to randomly switch targets or wander aimlessly for a few seconds.

tasks.title: Seasonal Weather Affixes
tasks.description: Make weather more dynamic by assigning unique 'Affixes' to each weather type based on the in-game season. For example, during a 'Winter Season' leaderboard period, Snow weather could additionally spawn randomly moving ice patches that cause severe sliding, while Rain could spawn healing puddles instead of lightning.

tasks.title: Weather Manipulation Buff
tasks.description: Introduce a rare 'Weather Control' booster. When picked up by a ball, it allows that ball to dictate the current weather for a set duration (e.g., 10 seconds), giving them a tactical advantage by choosing a weather condition that best fits their ball type (like summoning a thunderstorm when playing an elementalist).

tasks.title: Shrinking Ring of Fire Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard that spawns a large ring of fire which slowly shrinks over 10 seconds. Balls caught on the ring take continuous burn damage until they escape or the ring vanishes.

tasks.title: Quantum Swap Item
tasks.description: A consumable item that allows the ball to instantly swap positions with a targeted enemy or ally, throwing off opponent positioning and escaping corner traps.

tasks.title: Weaponized Teleporters
tasks.description: Allow some specific classes or items to 'weaponize' teleporters by placing a temporary trap on the destination pad, dealing damage or applying status effects to the next entity that teleports through.

tasks.title: One-Way Teleporters
tasks.description: Introduce a variation of teleporters that are strictly one-way. They randomly spawn and change destinations periodically, offering risky escape routes but potentially trapping balls in difficult areas.

tasks.title: Supply Drops
tasks.description: Periodically spawn supply drops in the arena that contain powerful but temporary boosters, such as invincibility, super speed, or explosive rounds, to create focal points for combat.

tasks.title: Daily Login Rewards
tasks.description: A streak-based daily login system granting prestige tokens, skill points, and exclusive cosmetics after consecutive logins.

tasks.title: Guild System
tasks.description: Players can form or join guilds, pooling resources to unlock shared guild buffs and participating in guild-vs-guild wars.

tasks.title: Supernova Mode
tasks.description: An intense variation of Black Hole where instead of instantly dying, balls take rapidly scaling heat damage over time as they approach the center. Eventually, the supernova explodes, knocking all surviving balls to the edges of the arena.

tasks.title: Destructible Cover System
tasks.description: Expand the arena procedural generation to include destructible obstacles (like crystal clusters or energy barricades) that can block movement and vision but can be destroyed with enough damage.

tasks.title: Wormhole Trap
tasks.description: A new hazard type that links two specific points in the arena. If a ball gets too close, it gets instantly teleported to the other wormhole node, carrying its current momentum. This would create chaotic repositioning.

tasks.title: Environmental Hazard - Sinkholes
tasks.description: In procedural arenas, sinkholes can randomly appear. Balls caught in a sinkhole have their speed reduced drastically and slowly take damage over time until they manage to dash or kite their way out.

tasks.title: Random Boss Mutation Event
tasks.description: During Custom Match, when the boss mutator is active, occasionally select a random ball and boost their size, health, and damage for 15 seconds, making them a temporary 'juggernaut' boss. The other players must team up to defeat them before they rack up too many kills.

tasks.title: Decoy Trap Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard that spawns a fake player dummy. If another player attacks it, the decoy explodes in a poison cloud, punishing impulsive actions.

tasks.title: Day and Night Cycle
tasks.description: Introduce a day and night cycle that affects visibility and ball behavior. Certain ball types (like Assassin or Phantom) gain stealth buffs or increased damage at night, while others like Paladin or Guardian are stronger during the day.

tasks.title: Interactive Environmental Hazards
tasks.description: Add interactive environmental elements that balls can trigger or push into each other, such as explosive barrels or bouncing pads. This would add an extra layer of strategy for positioning.

tasks.title: Tornado Skill
tasks.description: A new skill that creates a local tornado hazard that pulls nearby balls towards it and applies wind physics.

tasks.title: One-way portals
tasks.description: Portals that only allow travel in one direction, creating strategic choke points in the arena. They can be created by giving only one of the paired portals target coordinates.

tasks.title: Portal momentum scaling
tasks.description: Increase or decrease the ball's momentum upon exiting a portal depending on its speed. Can be implemented by scaling `vx` and `vy` when `hazard.kind == 'portal'`.

tasks.title: Guilds & Alliances
tasks.description: Introduce a Guilds system where players can create or join alliances. Guilds have dedicated chat channels, leaderboards, and a shared vault. In special Guild vs Guild (GvG) game modes, players represent their guild in multi-stage battles, capturing territory on a persistent world map. Winning territories yields passive resources for all guild members.

tasks.title: Crafting System and Item Synthesis
tasks.description: Implement a crafting system where players gather materials (like 'Iron Ore', 'Magic Dust', 'Void Shard') dropped by destroyed balls or special hazards during matches. These materials can be used between matches to craft consumable boosters, temporary stats modifiers, or rare cosmetics. Advanced recipes might require synthesizing basic items into more potent artifacts.

tasks.title: Bumper Upgrades
tasks.description: Allow bumpers to be upgraded to give powerups to the ball that bounces off them, creating interesting mechanics where players might intentionally hit bumpers.

tasks.title: Moving Bumpers
tasks.description: Introduce bumpers that are attached to paths or other entities, making them dynamic obstacles in the arena.

tasks.title: Mirror Match Arena
tasks.description: Every player spawns with an exact AI clone of themselves on the opposite side of the map. Clones mimic their creator's stats and skills.

tasks.title: Low Gravity Mode
tasks.description: A GameMode where the friction and gravity are drastically reduced, causing balls to slide around the map effortlessly and collisions to produce massive knockback.

tasks.title: Gravity Inversion Zone
tasks.description: A new arena hazard that periodically reverses gravity within its radius, causing balls to be repelled from each other instead of behaving normally, which can be used to break up enemy groupings.

tasks.title: Quantum Entanglement
tasks.description: Two balls can become quantum entangled, meaning they share damage taken but also share healing, creating new tactical trade-offs during chaotic team fights.

tasks.title: New hazard: Black Hole Trap
tasks.description: A rare procedural trap that slowly pulls players in, instantly killing them if they reach the center, but can be disabled by destroying its tether points.

tasks.title: New ball type: Magnet
tasks.description: A ball that passively pulls nearby boosters and smaller entities towards it, and has an active skill that violently pushes everything away.

tasks.title: Stealth Grass Patches
tasks.description: Introduce stealth zones (like tall grass) where balls entering the zone become invisible to enemies and lose their lock-on capabilities unless an enemy enters the same stealth patch.

tasks.title: Weather-dependent Cosmetics
tasks.description: Add visual changes (cosmetics) to balls that change dynamically depending on the current weather condition, like a little umbrella when it rains or snow goggles in snow.

tasks.title: Shrinking Safe Zone Modifiers
tasks.description: Combine the shrinking safe zone mode with the modifier zones. The modifiers spawn near the center of the safe zone to force players to clash over the buffs while trying to survive the incoming death circle.

tasks.title: Weather Hazards
tasks.description: Introduce more weather-specific hazards, like a 'mud pit' that forms when it rains, severely slowing down movement of any ball that steps in it, and 'ice slicks' in snow.

tasks.title: Lightning Storm Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard that roams the arena similar to a tornado, but instead of pulling balls in, it periodically shoots lightning strikes at nearby balls, dealing burst damage and temporarily disabling their skills.

tasks.title: Anti-Gravity Hazard
tasks.description: An arena hazard zone that periodically turns on, causing any balls inside to lose traction, reducing their turn rate to near zero and making them drift in their current direction.

tasks.title: Necromancer Soul Siphon
tasks.description: When the Necromancer ball hits an enemy that is under 20% HP, it has a chance to execute them instantly and restore its own HP proportional to the enemy's max HP, converting the defeated enemy into a temporary shield aura.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Upgrade
tasks.description: A new skill that deals damage to one enemy and then chains to up to 3 nearby enemies within a short radius, with each jump dealing slightly reduced damage.

tasks.title: Clan System
tasks.description: Allow players to create or join clans, complete clan-specific quests, and compete in clan vs clan leaderboards.

tasks.title: Weekly Mutators
tasks.description: Introduce weekly mutators to standard game modes (e.g., low gravity, double damage) to keep gameplay fresh.

tasks.title: Poison Nova Skill
tasks.description: A skill that emits an expanding ring of poison, applying a severe Damage Over Time effect to all enemies caught in it.

tasks.title: Weather Effects Mode
tasks.description: Add dynamic weather hazards like lightning strikes, snowstorms (slowing down movement), or rain (reducing vision range).

tasks.title: Weather-Specific Minions
tasks.description: Add new entity types or minions that only spawn during specific weather conditions, providing dynamic environmental challenges.

tasks.title: Meteor Shower Skill
tasks.description: A skill that rains down meteors on random enemy locations, creating a chaotic hazard zone.

tasks.title: Bouncy Bumpers Mode
tasks.description: Add a new game mode with lots of bouncy bumpers and physics-based knockback logic to push balls around the arena.

tasks.title: Dynamic Map Flooding
tasks.description: During prolonged 'rain' weather events, low areas of the arena could slowly flood, creating water hazards that drastically slow non-aquatic or non-floating entities.

tasks.title: Magnetic Grapple
tasks.description: An ability that allows the player or AI ball to shoot a magnetic tether at an enemy, pulling themselves quickly towards the target to close the gap for melee attacks.

tasks.title: Decoy Distraction Beacon
tasks.description: A new skill that deploys a stationary decoy beacon which draws enemy aggro and emits a continuous low-level heal to nearby allies before exploding.

tasks.title: Portal Gun Skill
tasks.description: A new skill for a Trickster ball that shoots two linked portals onto the arena ground, allowing the ball or its allies to instantly teleport across the map and ambush enemies.

tasks.title: Time Stop Booster
tasks.description: A booster that temporarily freezes all enemies and hazards in the arena for 3 seconds, allowing the collector to easily reposition or escape.

tasks.title: Reverse Knockback Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where collisions pull entities together instead of pushing them apart, creating chaotic clusters of balls that can be targeted by AoE attacks.

tasks.title: Bouncy Borders
tasks.description: The arena boundaries reflect projectiles and entities with increased speed, allowing for insane trick shots and punishing players who get too close to the edge.

tasks.title: Pinball Mechanics Mode
tasks.description: Introduces pinball flippers and bumpers around the arena that randomly activate or can be triggered, drastically changing the trajectory and momentum of balls.

tasks.title: Blackout Game Mode
tasks.description: A new game mode where the entire arena is shrouded in complete darkness except for a small ring of light around each ball. Players must navigate and fight using echolocation cues or occasional lightning flashes that reveal the whole map for a split second.

tasks.title: Reverse Controls Trap
tasks.description: A booster or hazard that randomly spawns and, if stepped on, temporarily inverts the movement controls of all balls on the opposing team, creating a chaotic environment and allowing for clutch offensive plays.

tasks.title: Chain Lightning Combo
tasks.description: Introduce a chained lightning attack that bounces between nearby targets. During 'thunderstorm' weather, the chain range and damage are significantly increased.

tasks.title: Windstorm Glide
tasks.description: Allow specific lightweight ball types, like the scout, to consume stamina and ride the wind drafts during 'wind' weather, traveling significantly faster and ignoring ground friction.

tasks.title: Lightning Strikes
tasks.description: During thunderstorms, lightning strikes random locations in the arena periodically, dealing massive AoE damage to any ball caught in the blast radius.

tasks.title: Stormcaller Trait
tasks.description: A new passive trait for balls that empowers their elemental attacks based on the current weather. During rain or thunderstorms, 'lightning_strike' and 'elemental_burst' deal 50% more damage and chain to one additional target. During fog, the skills have a larger AOE radius.

tasks.title: Lightning Rod Trap
tasks.description: A deployable hazard trap that attracts all chain lightning strikes and electrical skills within its radius, safely absorbing the damage while charging up. Once fully charged, it unleashes an EMP burst that silences and slows all nearby enemies.

tasks.title: Mirror Image Powerup
tasks.description: A booster that creates 3 temporary decoys of the ball, all mimicking its movement but dealing no damage, to confuse enemies.

tasks.title: Nemesis Mode
tasks.description: A new game mode where one overpowered boss ball faces off against a team of weaker AI balls.

tasks.title: Clone Decoy Booster
tasks.description: A booster that when collected creates a temporary AI clone of the player that taunts enemies but deals no damage.

tasks.title: New Hazard: Time Dilation Field
tasks.description: A new procedural arena hazard that drastically slows down the movement speed and action timers of all balls caught within its radius, creating tactical chokepoints.

tasks.title: New Skill: Reflector Shield
tasks.description: A skill that creates a temporary shield around the ball that reflects all incoming projectiles or physical damage back to the attacker for 3 seconds.

tasks.title: Tornado Warning Siren
tasks.description: Add an audio/visual siren 3 seconds before a tornado spawns in thunderstorm weather so players have a brief warning to move out of the area.

tasks.title: Gravity Mine Booster
tasks.description: A booster that deploys a small trap which pulls nearby enemies in and deals continuous damage when triggered.

tasks.title: Orbital Shield Utility Skill
tasks.description: Add a new utility skill 'Orbital Shield' that creates a localized 300-radius dome that significantly reduces incoming damage from area effects like meteors and orbital strikes, providing an anchor point for teams during chaotic events.

tasks.title: Nemesis Tracking UI
tasks.description: Add a UI screen to view current nemeses and their kill counts.

tasks.title: Lightning Rod Ball Type
tasks.description: A new ball type that can absorb lightning strikes for health/speed boosts instead of taking damage, and attracts lightning away from allies.

tasks.title: Nemesis Hunter Booster
tasks.description: A booster that specifically increases movement speed towards your nemesis.

tasks.title: Shrinking Health Hazard
tasks.description: A hazard that slowly shrinks the maximum health of nearby players over time.

tasks.title: Reverse Gravity Booster
tasks.description: A booster that reverses the gravity for a short time for players that touch it.

tasks.title: Orbital Strike Warning UI Element
tasks.description: When an orbital strike hazard spawns, show a large, pulsating crosshair UI element and play a warning siren sound effect for the 3 seconds before it strikes, giving players a clearer cue to evacuate the massive area.

tasks.title: Grappling Hook Mode
tasks.description: Balls can shoot a grappling hook to latch onto walls or other balls to swing around.

tasks.title: Mirror Dimension
tasks.description: An arena event where all projectiles are reflected infinitely across mirror walls.

tasks.title: Teleporting Decoy
tasks.description: Allow players to reactivate the decoy skill to instantly swap positions with their active decoy, providing superior mobility and evasion.

tasks.title: Shrinking Hazards
tasks.description: Hazards that slowly shrink the safe playable area over time, similar to a battle royale zone.

tasks.title: Decoy Explosion Damage
tasks.description: Make the decoy explode upon its timer expiring or when destroyed, dealing AoE damage to nearby enemies and rewarding players who strategically place them near clusters.

tasks.title: Magnetic Fields Hazard
tasks.description: Hazards that exert continuous pushing or pulling forces on players within their area of effect.

tasks.title: Decoy Spawner Hazard
tasks.description: A new arena hazard that periodically spawns non-damaging, fast-moving decoys that mimic player movements to confuse AI targeting and waste cooldowns.

tasks.title: Escort the Payload Mode
tasks.description: A game mode where one team must escort an invulnerable but slow-moving 'payload' ball to the enemy base, while the other team tries to delay it until the timer runs out.

tasks.title: Bounty Hunter Classes
tasks.description: Introduce a new ball class called 'Bounty Hunter' that deals double damage to balls marked as bounties or high-threat targets in specific game modes.

tasks.title: Decoy Explosion
tasks.description: A new passive for the deploy_decoy ability where the decoy violently explodes upon being destroyed or when its timer runs out, damaging nearby enemies.

tasks.title: Randomized Safe Zone Shrink Shapes
tasks.description: Instead of a simple circular shrinking zone, the safe zone can shrink into varied geometric shapes (like a rectangle or a triangle) or even split into two smaller temporary safe zones before merging back. This disrupts camping strategies and keeps players constantly repositioning.

tasks.title: Supply Drops in Moving Safe Zone
tasks.description: Periodically spawn high-value supply drops (boosters, healing springs, strong weapons) slightly outside or on the edge of the moving safe zone, forcing players to risk taking damage for a chance at powerful gear to dominate late game.

tasks.title: Mirror Match Game Mode
tasks.description: A new game mode where every ball starts with a reflect shield and no standard attacks work. Players must push map hazards or environmental objects into each other to deal damage, rewarding positional play and strategic bounces.

tasks.title: Interactive Crowd Hazards
tasks.description: Expand the crowd system so that if the crowd's excitement drops too low (boring match), they start throwing hazards into the arena, such as temporary walls, slow fields, or mini-bombs, forcing players to engage and play more aggressively to appease the crowd.

tasks.title: Healing Rain Weather
tasks.description: A new weather event where gentle rain gradually restores HP to all balls.

tasks.title: Sponsor System
tasks.description: Players can pick a 'Sponsor' before a match begins. Depending on the sponsor chosen, they receive different types of buffs (e.g., speed, health, damage) at specific intervals or under certain conditions (e.g., when they get a double kill). Sponsors could also have drawbacks, such as reduced max HP for increased damage, adding strategic depth.

tasks.title: Shield Overload Explosion
tasks.description: If a reflect shield takes damage exceeding its maximum capacity in a single hit, the remaining damage causes an overload explosion that deals AoE damage to everyone nearby, including the shield owner.

tasks.title: Reverse Controls Event
tasks.description: Periodically swap player controls to add confusion.

tasks.title: Payload Mutator
tasks.description: A game mode where the payload periodically pulses out healing to defenders and damage to attackers.

tasks.title: Reverse Escort
tasks.description: Two payloads move towards the center, the team that destroys the enemy payload first wins.

tasks.title: Hazard Interaction Combos
tasks.description: Allow specific hazards to interact with each other for combo effects. For example, if a 'magnet' hazard pulls an 'explosive_barrel' or a 'flare', it creates a massive clustered explosion or area-of-effect zone. This introduces a strategic depth where players can trick enemies into pulling explosives towards them.

tasks.title: Repulsion Field Hazard
tasks.description: Introduce a 'repulsion_field' hazard that dynamically pushes players away. Unlike the gravity_well or magnet which attract balls, the repulsion field pushes entities outward. This can create fun zone-control dynamics where players can use the field as a barrier or get unexpectedly launched out of a safe zone.

tasks.title: Grappling Hook
tasks.description: Add a new ability to allow balls to grapple and pull themselves towards walls.

tasks.title: Minefield Event
tasks.description: A random event where multiple invisible or visible mines appear, detonating on contact.

tasks.title: Tug-of-War Mode
tasks.description: Introduce a mode where a single payload is centered. Both teams fight to push/pull the payload to the opposing team’s goal.

tasks.title: Asymmetric Maps
tasks.description: Introduce map layouts where defenders have positional advantages, like high ground or choke points, but limited resources, while attackers have open spawn areas with plenty of health packs.

tasks.title: Stamina Drain Field
tasks.description: A hazard that constantly drains stamina of players standing inside it, discouraging camping.

tasks.title: Speed Burst Shoes
tasks.description: An item that drastically increases movement speed for a short duration while leaving a trail of fire.

tasks.title: Magnetize Weather Event
tasks.description: Introduce a 'magnetic storm' weather event that randomly assigns positive or negative polarities to balls. Balls with opposite polarities are slowly pulled towards each other, while balls with the same polarity are pushed apart, disrupting formations and forcing repositioning.

tasks.title: Glitch Zone Hazard
tasks.description: Add a new hazard called 'Glitch Zone'. When a ball enters this zone, its inputs are randomized or delayed for a short period, simulating a hacked or glitched state. This would add an element of unpredictability and require careful pathing to avoid.

tasks.title: Dynamic Crowd Chants
tasks.description: Add specific text-based or audio-based crowd chants depending on the leading team, recognizing dominant strategies or unique ball types (e.g. chanting 'Assassin! Assassin!' when a stealth ball goes on a killing spree).
